case_title: ANDREW LIPSETT DBA ADVANCED DESIGN VS. SUZANNE FELSON

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ANDREW LIPSETT DBA ADVANCED DESIGN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT FELSON, SUZANNE $3,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $125.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,625.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS, SEE JUDGMENT ATTACHED PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED

WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY FILED BY PLAINTIFF ANDREW LIPSETT DBA ADVANCED DESIGN AS TO DEFENDANT FELSON, SUZANNE

EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED JAN-02-2025 ORDERED DESTROYED
REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING FILED BY DEFENDANT FELSON, SUZANNE
